---
title: "003_transposed_genes_enrichment"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
Read transposed genes table 
```{r}
BiocManager::install("clusterProfiler")
organism = "org.At.tair.db"
BiocManager::install(organism, character.only = TRUE)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
transposed_genes <- fread("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/manuscript/04_output/syntenic_and_tranposed_genes/syn_and_transp_genes_thal.csv")
```
## Check if genes have introns
```{r}
gene_annotation <- read.table("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/manuscript/01_data/tair10/TAIR10_GFF3_genes.gff") %>% filter(V3=="gene" | V3=="exon")
gene_annotation$gene_id <- gsub(";.*", "",gene_annotation$V9)
gene_annotation$gene_id <- gsub("ID=", "", gene_annotation$gene_id)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Count exons per gene (genes with >1 exon have introns)
exon_counts <- gene_annotation %>%
  filter(V3 == "exon") %>%
  mutate(gene_id_clean = gsub("Parent=", "", gene_id),
         gene_id_clean = gsub("\\.\\d+$", "", gene_id_clean)) %>%  # strip isoform suffix .1, .2 etc
  group_by(gene_id_clean) %>%
  summarise(n_exons = n_distinct(V4, V5)) %>%  # distinct exon start/end positions
  mutate(has_intron = n_exons > 1)

# Join to your transposed_genes table
transposed_genes <- transposed_genes %>%
  left_join(exon_counts, by = c("gene_thal" = "gene_id_clean"))

# Check
table(transposed_genes$has_intron)

transposed_genes_transp <- transposed_genes[transposed_genes$is_transposed=="TRUE" & transposed_genes$has_intron=="TRUE",]
transposed_genes_transp$context_combined = case_when(
      transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="high_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="high_thal" ~ "high_high",
     transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="low_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="low_thal" ~ "low_low",
     transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="low_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="high_thal" ~ "low_high",
     transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="high_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="low_thal" ~ "high_low",)

table(transposed_genes_transp$has_intron, transposed_genes_transp$context_combined)
```
TE proximity 
```{r}
te_annotation <- read.table("/groups/nordborg/projects/ddm1_resilencing/11_resources/ref_genome/TAIR10_Transposable_Elements.txt", header=T)
```

```{r}
library(data.table)

# Make sure both are data.tables
setDT(transposed_genes)
setDT(te_annotation)

# Fix chromosome naming mismatch (Chr1 -> 1)
# Extract chromosome number from TE name (AT1TE... -> 1)
te_annotation[, chrom := gsub("AT(\\d+)TE.*", "\\1", Transposon_Name)]

# For each gene, find nearest TE on same chromosome
# Gene midpoint or you can use start/end
transposed_genes[, gene_mid := (start_thal + end_thal) / 2]

# Set keys for fast joining
setkey(transposed_genes, chrom_thal, start_thal)
setkey(te_annotation, chrom, Transposon_min_Start)

# Calculate distance to nearest TE
nearest_te <- te_annotation[, .(chrom, Transposon_min_Start, Transposon_max_End, 
                                  Transposon_Family, Transposon_Super_Family)]

# For each gene, compute min distance to any TE on same chrom
dist_to_te <- transposed_genes[, {
  same_chrom_tes <- nearest_te[chrom == chrom_thal]
  
  # Distance = 0 if overlapping, else gap between gene and TE
  dist <- pmin(
    abs(start_thal - same_chrom_tes$Transposon_max_End),
    abs(end_thal   - same_chrom_tes$Transposon_min_Start)
  )
  
  # Set distance to 0 if gene overlaps TE
  overlaps <- same_chrom_tes$Transposon_min_Start <= end_thal & 
              same_chrom_tes$Transposon_max_End   >= start_thal
  dist[overlaps] <- 0
  
  min_idx <- which.min(dist)
  .(dist_to_nearest_te     = dist[min_idx],
    nearest_te_family      = same_chrom_tes$Transposon_Family[min_idx],
    nearest_te_superfamily = same_chrom_tes$Transposon_Super_Family[min_idx])
}, by = gene_thal]

# Join back
transposed_genes <- merge(transposed_genes, dist_to_te, by = "gene_thal")


transposed_genes_transp <- transposed_genes[transposed_genes$is_transposed=="FALSE" & transposed_genes$has_intron=="TRUE",]

transposed_genes_transp$context_combined = case_when(
      transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="high_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="high_thal" ~ "high_high",
     transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="low_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="low_thal" ~ "low_low",
     transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="low_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="high_thal" ~ "low_high",
     transposed_genes_transp$context_lyr=="high_lyr" &  transposed_genes_transp$context_thal=="low_thal" ~ "high_low",)

transposed_genes_transp_not_near_te <-transposed_genes_transp[transposed_genes_transp$dist_to_nearest_te >0,]

table(transposed_genes_transp_not_near_te$has_intron, transposed_genes_transp_not_near_te$context_combined)
summary(transposed_genes_transp_not_near_te$dist_to_nearest_te)
```

## Get a fasta of these genes 
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(Biostrings)


library(Biostrings)

# Read the FASTA genome correctly
genome <- readDNAStringSet("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/manuscript/01_data/tair10/TAIR10_chr_all.fas")
names(genome) <- gsub(" .*", "", names(genome)) # Fix names
genes_dt <- transposed_genes_transp_not_near_te

sequences <- DNAStringSet(mapply(function(chr, s, e) {
  genome[[chr]][s:e]
}, paste0("Chr", genes_dt$chrom_thal), genes_dt$start_thal, genes_dt$end_thal))

names(sequences) <- genes_dt$gene_thal

writeXStringSet(sequences, filepath = "/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/manuscript/04_output/syntenic_and_tranposed_genes/fasta/not_transposed_genes.fasta")

gene_lengths <- data.table(gene = names(sequences), length_bp = width(sequences))
gene_lengths

write.table(gene_lengths, 
            file = "/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/manuscript/04_output/syntenic_and_tranposed_genes/fasta/gene_lengths.txt", 
            quote = FALSE, 
            row.names = FALSE)
```
## See if gene appears in different places
```{r}
library(data.table)

blast <- fread("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/manuscript/04_output/syntenic_and_tranposed_genes/fasta/blast_results_not_transposed_genes.txt", header = FALSE,
               col.names = c("qseqid","sseqid","pident","length",
                             "mismatch","gapopen","qstart","qend",
                             "sstart","send","evalue","bitscore"))

# Count number of hits per gene
hits_per_gene <- blast[, .(n_hits = .N), by = qseqid]
hits_per_gene
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

hits_per_gene <- blast[, .(n_hits = .N), by = qseqid]

ggplot(hits_per_gene, aes(x = reorder(qseqid, -n_hits), y = n_hits)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#1D9E75") +
  theme_minimal() +
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7)) +
  labs(x = "Gene", y = "Number of BLAST Hits", title = "")


ggplot(blast, aes(pident, length))+geom_point()
## Calculate coverage percentage 
coverage <- read.table("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/manuscript/04_output/syntenic_and_tranposed_genes/fasta/gene_lengths.txt", header = T)
blast_with_length <- inner_join(blast,coverage,by=c("qseqid"="gene") )
blast_with_length$perc_cov <- (blast_with_length$length/blast_with_length$length_bp) *100

ggplot(blast_with_length, aes(perc_cov,pident))+geom_point()
```

Run Gene Ontology in R 
```{r}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.At.tair.db)
library(ggplot2)
transposed_genes_thaliana <- transposed_genes[transposed_genes$is_transposed=="TRUE" & transposed_genes$context_combined=="low_low",]

background_genes <- transposed_genes$gene_thal

ego <- enrichGO(gene          = transposed_genes_thaliana$gene_thal,
                universe      = background_genes,
                OrgDb         = org.At.tair.db,
                keyType       = "TAIR",
                ont           = "ALL",
                pAdjustMethod = "none")

# plot
dotplot(ego)
barplot(ego, showCategory = 20)
```

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)

# get your gene list
transposed_genes_thaliana <- transposed_genes[
  transposed_genes$is_transposed == "FALSE" & 
  transposed_genes$context_combined == "low_low", ]

# run enrichment
gost_results <- gost(
  query = transposed_genes_thaliana$gene_thal,
  organism = "athaliana",          # Arabidopsis thaliana
  sources = c("GO:BP", "GO:MF", "GO:CC"),  # adjust as needed
  significant = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr"        # or "bonferroni", "none"
)

# plot
gost_results$result %>%
  arrange(p_value) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = -log10(p_value), y = reorder(term_name, -p_value), 
             color = source, size = intersection_size)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "-log10(p-value)", y = "", size = "Gene count", color = "Source") +
  theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~source)
```
